$comment: Compound V hooks. SubagentStop event was previously used but is not documented in official Claude Code hooks reference; removed v0.1.1 after honesty audit. SessionStart matcher pattern copied from upstream obra/superpowers v5.1.0. memory-refresh.sh (v2.0) is APPENDED to both events — it is silent (emits no context) and self-backgrounds an FTS5-only `refresh --quick`, so it composes with the banner/nudge without blocking and never installs/downloads.
